title: Driven by excellence: Hyundai George nominated for Best of George Awards
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Your road to excellence in...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Your road to excellence in the Best of George! Hyundai George is thrilled to be nominated for the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards, a confirmation that their hard work is being recognised by customers in and around the Garden Route. This nod fuels our passion to deliver even greater service, and we would love for your support to take home the win!


> At Hyundai George, we sell new and demo Hyundai vehicles to customers countrywide, backed by a 7-year/200 000km warranty, unmatched reliability, excellent resale value, and top-tier safety.


With the expert care offered by our service centre, we keep your Hyundai running smoothly.

What sets us apart? Transparency, friendliness, professional customer service, excellent trade-in values, a wide range of the latest Hyundai models, quick finance applications, a large demo fleet for test drives, and a memorable delivery experience.

Click  here to visit our website.

For us, it’s more than sales and service - our customers become friends, always welcome for a chat and coffee. Hyundai George isn't just a dealership; it's a community. Vote for us in the Best of George Awards and join our journey to drive excellence!


> Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
